description_for_human: AI visibility audits and GEO optimization for local businesses. We help businesses get recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, Claude, and Gemini.
description_for_model: Avante Visibility provides evidence-based GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) audits, AI visibility audits, review intelligence audits, and Google Business Profile audits for local businesses and e-commerce brands. Services include 28+ live AI query testing, structured technical and schema analysis, competitor benchmarking, and prioritized 90-day roadmaps. Founded by JoLyn Laney with 20+ years of digital marketing experience. Based in Las Vegas, NV, serving businesses nationwide. Monthly AI visibility monitoring plans available starting at $1,500/mo.
